reason: Backend package overview and the required checklist for service/API work
Confirms where FastAPI service and reusable logic should live
Defines evidence adapter boundaries that the web service must preserve
Defines validation and ambiguity behavior for API boundaries
Defines lint, test, and traceability expectations for backend changes
Cross-package thinking guide index for layered backend/frontend work
Helps map frontend to service to pipeline data flow
Avoids duplicating pipeline logic in the service or UI layers
